text.title: chunking-production-service Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for chunking-production-service as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Passing strategy=SEMANTIC to ChunkingService without checking that embedding_func is set before constructing the service.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: ChunkingService raises ValueError at chunk time if embedding_func is None for SEMANTIC strategy. The fallback then silently returns word-split chunks that look like successful output. Validate embedding_func at service construction time and raise immediately.

failure-mode.description: Using ChunkingService's word-split fallback path as a default for corpora with no structure, rather than explicitly configuring RecursiveChunker.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: ChunkingService's fallback uses word-based splitting that ignores token limits — verify with tiktoken before ingesting. RecursiveChunker from chunking-basics correctly handles overlap and token counting; the fallback does not.
